remarks: Set on 150 feet of private sandy beach along Stamford Harbor, this exceptional Shippan Point waterfront offers a rare combination of direct sandy beachfront, striking views, and an exceptional position along the waterfront. With a western-facing orientation, the property enjoys beautiful sunsets and sweeping water views across the harbor and out toward the New York City skyline. Approached by a cobblestone driveway and surrounded by mature landscaping, the home has an understated and refined presence. The rear of the property opens to a broad terrace and manicured lawn that lead directly to the beach, creating a seamless connection to the water. This 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath home offers light-filled living spaces, many oriented toward the water. A spacious kitchen with oversized island and adjacent breakfast area opens to the outdoors, while a formal dining room and multiple living areas provide flexibility. A full-length enclosed porch offers panoramic water views and is one of the home's standout features. The property also includes a separate cottage on its own parcel, offering flexibility for guests, extended family, or future use. Located just a short walk from the Stamford Yacht Club and only minutes to Metro North with frequent express service to Manhattan, the setting offers a unique combination of privacy, accessibility, and direct connection to the water that is difficult to replicate.
